column1: # Raycast extension catalog managed by Groundwork.
# Raycast owns extension installation and settings internally; this file gives
# Groundwork a reproducible checklist and opens the right Store pages.
# Verified 2026-06-27 where exact Store pages are listed.

column5: Search bookmarks from installed browsers in Raycast. Enable Zen, Chrome, Dia, Safari, or others inside the extension with Select Browsers.
Search and save Anybox links from Raycast. Paste the Anybox API key into the Search Links command preferences.
Search live tabs for AppleScript-friendly browsers such as Safari and Chromium-family browsers. Zen is Firefox-based, so treat Anybox and Browser Bookmarks as the reliable cross-browser layer.
Search repos, issues, pull requests, and actions from Raycast after GitHub login.
Search and run Homebrew actions from Raycast.
Open recent VS Code/Cursor-style projects from Raycast.
Not an extension. Raycast Pro gives Quick AI, AI Chat, AI Commands, and model switching from the launcher.
Bring-your-own-key option if you do not want Raycast Pro's unified AI.
Bring-your-own-key option for Claude from Raycast.
Bring-your-own-key option for xAI/Grok from Raycast.
